questions.q: How long is the probation period given to former Michigan football coach Sherrone Moore following his plea agreement on April 14, 2026?
questions.correctText: Sherrone Moore was sentenced to 18 months of probation and fined for two misdemeanor charges related to a confrontation with a former staffer.

questions.q: What is the official title of the newly announced 'Game of Thrones' movie?
On April 14, 2026, Disney quietly delisted 15 of its classic titles, including older Star Wars games, from which digital PC storefront?
A new trial resumed in Argentina on April 14, 2026, against seven medical professionals accused of negligence leading to the death of which soccer legend?
questions.correctText: The trial centers on seven medical professionals accused of failing to provide adequate care to Diego Maradona in the weeks leading up to his death.

questions.q: Boston Red Sox outfielder Jarren Duran directed an obscene gesture toward a fan during a 6-0 loss to which team on April 14, 2026?
questions.correctText: Jarren Duran made the gesture toward a fan at Target Field during a loss to the Minnesota Twins, stating the fan made a comment that crossed the line.

questions.q: According to Margot Robbie, the 'Ocean's 11' prequel will center on Danny Ocean's parents pulling off a heist at which 1962 event?
What public health milestone is currently being threatened by the introduction of new, toxic synthetic alternatives into the street drug supply?
options: A historic decline in U.S. overdose deaths
A record low in emergency room wait times
A drastic drop in youth vaping rates
A decrease in prescription opioid distributions
questions.correctText: A historic decline in U.S. overdose deaths

questions.q: Alex Ovechkin recorded an assist in what could be the final game of his NHL career during the Capitals' 2-1 season-finale victory against which team?
questions.correctText: Ovechkin assisted on the go-ahead goal in the Washington Capitals' 2-1 victory against the Columbus Blue Jackets on Tuesday night.

questions.q: Who was the original voice actor for Star Fox 64's Wolf O'Donnell and Bill Grey, whose passing was widely reported in the gaming community on April 15, 2026?
According to a study published in the Journal of Affective Disorders, consuming two to three cups of what beverage a day is linked to a lower risk of mental health disorders?
